title: Per-Commitment Secrets
description: Lightning derives a fresh per-commitment secret for each new channel state and turns it into per-commitment points and commitment keys. This secret chain enables state-specific revocation and keeps old and new commitment transactions cryptographically distinct.

resources.title: Programming Lightning: Commitment Secrets
resources.notes: Interactive lesson on the descending secret chain, per-commitment points, and the key-derivation role they play in Lightning channel states.

resources.title: BOLT 03: Bitcoin Transaction and Script Formats
resources.notes: Canonical reference for per-commitment points, revocation keys, and the state-specific key material used in Lightning commitments.

resources.title: Mastering the Lightning Network
resources.notes: Best long-form treatment of commitment state evolution, revocation design, and the cryptographic machinery behind channel safety.
